business_ideas.idea: Executive Health Checkup premium membership (Soho House for medicine): $10-20k/year for 1-2 day intensive health screening in Bay Area, LA, New York
Hunt Brothers Pizza: ultra-compact pizza shops (50-100 sq ft) in gas stations/convenience stores, no royalty model, ingredient-only fees
Geoguessr: geographic location guessing game using Google Street View, premium subscription model with esports tournaments

predictions.text: Executive health checkups and longevity optimization will become increasingly popular and high-status among wealthy demographics
